chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4648 of 2013 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.29349/2013. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Khalid Jawed, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Petitioner in this petition seeks employment in a Government department on the basis of deceased quota / son quota. The Supreme Court has already declared the same to be unlawful vide judgment dated 26.09.2024 in the case of General Post Office Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021). It has also been reported that Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974, has already been deleted by the Sindh Cabinet on 04.12.2024. In view of the foregoing this petition is prima facie misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
